data.name: Add New Roles
Add New Users
Allows assigning or removing roles for any user.
data.value: 允許對任何使用者指派或移除角色。

data.name: Allows chatting with real/underlying Ollama models directly through the gateway.
data.value: 允許透過閘道直接與真實/底層 Ollama 模型進行對話。

data.name: Allows chatting with virtual models through the gateway UI or API.
data.value: 允許透過閘道器 UI 或 API 與虛擬模型進行對話。

data.name: Allows managing the underlying Ollama model providers/servers.
data.value: 允許管理底層的 Ollama 模型提供者/伺服器。

data.name: Allows modification of role names and their assigned permissions.
data.value: 允許修改角色名稱及其分配的權限。

data.name: Allows modification of user details like email and roles, and can also reset user passwords.
data.value: 允許修改使用者詳細資訊，例如電子郵件和角色，並可重設使用者密碼。

data.name: Allows the permanent deletion of roles.
Allows the permanent deletion of user accounts.
data.value: 允許永久刪除使用者帳戶。

data.name: Allows viewing and managing API keys for the current user.
data.value: 允許檢視及管理目前使用者的 API 金鑰。

data.name: Allows viewing and managing virtual models that override underlying Ollama models.
data.value: 允許檢視與管理會覆寫底層 Ollama 模型的虛擬模型。

data.name: Allows viewing and modifying global application settings.
data.value: 允許檢視和修改全域應用程式設定。

data.name: Allows viewing system-level information and settings.
data.value: 允許檢視系統層級的資訊與設定。

data.name: Allows viewing the background job dashboard and managing jobs.
data.value: 允許檢視背景工作儀表板並管理工作。

data.name: Allows viewing the list of all permissions and their assignments to roles and users.
data.value: 允許檢視所有權限及其分配給角色和使用者的清單。

data.name: Allows viewing the list of all users.
data.value: 允許檢視所有使用者的清單。

data.name: Allows viewing the list of roles and their assigned permissions.
data.value: 允許檢視角色清單及其分配的權限。

data.name: Assign Roles to Users
Chat With Underlying Models
Chat With Virtual Models
Delete Roles
Delete Users
Edit Role Information
Edit User Information
Grants permission to create new roles.
data.value: 授予建立新角色的權限。

data.name: Grants permission to create new user accounts.
data.value: 授予建立新使用者帳戶的權限。

data.name: Grants permission to restart the application instance. May cause availability interruptions but all settings and cache will be reloaded.
data.value: 授予重新啟動應用程式實例的權限。可能導致服務中斷，但所有設定和快取都將重新載入。

data.name: Manage API Keys
Manage Global Settings
Manage Providers
Manage Virtual Models
Read Permissions
Read Roles
Read Users
Reboot This App
View Background Jobs
View System Context
